---
title: "跨文本综合 / Cross-Text Synthesis"
subtitle: "10 flagship essays tracing one Omega theorem across five classical corpora and the Gen 2 papers"
listing:
  - id: synthesis-essays
    contents: "essay-*.qmd"
    sort: "order"
    type: default
    fields: [title, subtitle, description]
---

## Complete Track

This track no longer starts from a single classical work. It starts from **one Omega theorem kernel**, then follows its structural appearance across 道德经、易经、黄帝内经、孙子兵法、几何原本 and the Gen 2 paper program.

These essays are the highest-density layer in the cultural project: theorem-first, cross-text, bilingual, and explicitly separated into `formal correspondence` versus `metaphorical analogy`.

## Essay Map

| # | Essay | Primary Theorem | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| 01 | [No11 与知止之美](essay-01-no11_golden_mean_shift.qmd) | `fibonacci_cardinality` | drafted |
| 02 | [递推增长与由一而多](essay-02-fibonacci_growth_recurrence.qmd) | `fibonacci_cardinality_recurrence` | drafted |
| 03 | [Fold：过量如何被折回稳定域](essay-03-fold_operator.qmd) | `fold_is_idempotent` | drafted |
| 04 | [唯一稀疏分解与规范形](essay-04-zeckendorf_uniqueness.qmd) | `zeckendorf_uniqueness` | drafted |
| 05 | [逆极限与层级整体](essay-05-inverse_limit_modular_tower.qmd) | `inverse_limit_extensionality` | drafted |
| 06 | [主模态、兵势与脉象](essay-06-spectral_theory.qmd) | `goldenMeanAdjacency_has_goldenRatio_eigenvector` | drafted |
| 07 | [最小公设、最少破坏与最优保真](essay-07-rate_distortion.qmd) | `scanError_hasCertificate` | drafted |
| 08 | [相生相克与稳定环](essay-08-ring_arithmetic.qmd) | `stableValue_ring_isomorphism` | drafted |
| 09 | [四时、反者道之动与势](essay-09-dynamical_systems.qmd) | `topological_entropy_eq_log_phi` | drafted |
| 10 | [看不见的东西如何被看见](essay-10-fiber_scan_observation.qmd) | `observation_refinement_reduces_error` | drafted |

## Essays

:::{#synthesis-essays}
:::

---

[Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd) | [Back to Home](../../index.qmd)
